name: status-pipe
description: Review/response queue over fleets of autonomous coding agents. Monitors status-pipe protocol state files, enriches them with forge data (GitHub, Bitbucket), and supervises agent loops.

statusPipe.protocolDir.description: Name of the protocol state directory at each repo root.

statusPipe.staleWorkerMinutesDefault.description: Minutes without a worker heartbeat before a worker is considered stale, when the repo's config.json does not specify staleWorkerMinutes.

statusPipe.forge.type.description: Forge backend. 'auto' guesses from the remote URL; set explicitly to override.

statusPipe.forge.github.token.markdownDescription: GitHub token. Leave empty to fall back to `GITHUB_TOKEN`, the VS Code GitHub authentication provider, then the `gh` CLI.

statusPipe.forge.bitbucket.token.markdownDescription: Bitbucket app password or token. Leave empty to fall back to `BITBUCKET_TOKEN` or secret storage (Status Pipe: Sign in to Bitbucket).

statusPipe.forge.refreshIntervalSeconds.description: Minimum interval between enrichment refreshes for a visible view.

statusPipe.tickets.jira.siteUrl.markdownDescription: Jira Cloud site URL (e.g. `https://your-org.atlassian.net`) used as the ticketing source for Bitbucket repos.

statusPipe.tickets.jira.email.markdownDescription: Jira account email for API token auth. Token comes from `JIRA_API_TOKEN` or secret storage.

statusPipe.launch.enabled.description: Master switch for the agent supervisor (launching agents from .status-pipe/launch.json).

statusPipe.launch.autoStart.description: Automatically start previously approved agents when the workspace opens.

statusPipe.launch.pauseWhenIdle.markdownDescription: Pause tick scheduling after 30 minutes without window focus. Off by default: it conflicts with overnight runs — parking already stops the loop when all work waits on you.

statusPipe.launch.maxRestarts.description: Consecutive failures before an agent is marked failed and surfaces in the queue.

statusPipe.resumeCommand.description: Fallback command run in the integrated terminal for 'Restart worker' when the repo has no launch.json.

statusPipe.quietRetentionHours.description: How long done/merged items stay visible in the QUIET lane.

statusPipe.notifications.blocker.description: Toast when a ticket reports a new blocker or owner question.

statusPipe.notifications.crashOrStale.description: Toast when a worker crashes or goes stale, or an agent launcher fails.

statusPipe.notifications.completed.description: Toast when a ticket reaches merged/done.

statusPipe.notifications.orphanedCi.description: Toast when CI fails on a PR no worker is watching.

statusPipe.notifications.doNotDisturb.description: Suppress all Status Pipe toasts (queue badges still update).

scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint && npm run format:check
scripts.test:e2e:playwright:docker:update: docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml run --rm -e PW_FLAGS=--update-snapshots playwright
